description.value: This book contains the formulas for Crafting the common items in Chapter 6 of the core rulebook.

A formula book holds the formulas necessary to make items other than the common equipment from this chapter; alchemists typically get one for free. Each formula book can hold the formulas for up to 100 different items. Formulas can also appear on parchment sheets, tablets, and almost any other medium; there's no need for you to copy them into a specific book as long as you can keep them on hand to reference them.

This gnarled staff is covered with thorns and coated with a glistening lacquer that acts as a minor irritant. While holding the staff, you aren't affected by its coating or thorns, and you reduce the DC of your flat checks to overcome persistent poison damage from 15 to 13.

Activate @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{Cast a Spell};

Effect You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.

  • Cantrips @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.izcxFQFwf3woCnFs]{Guidance}
  • 1st @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.QqxwHeYEVylkYjsO]{Detect Poison}, @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.DYdvMZ8G2LiSLVWw]{Spider Sting}

Using a writing set, you can draft correspondence and scribe scrolls. A set includes stationery, including a variety of paper and parchment, as well as ink, a quill or inkpen, sealing wax, and a simple seal. If you've written a large amount, you can refill your kit with extra ink and paper.
Extra ink and paper to refill your writing set.

This staff is topped with carved animal and monster heads. While wielding the staff, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Nature checks to identify animals.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

  • Cantrip @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.tXa5vOu5giBNCjdR]{Know Direction}
  • 1st @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.EE7Q5BHIrfWNCPtT]{Magic Fang} @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.4YnON9JHYqtLzccu]{Summon Animal}

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.

This polished wooden staff bears a swirling motif reminiscent of the folds of a brain. While wielding the staff, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to checks to identify mental magic.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

  • Cantrip @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.4gBIw4IDrSfFHik4]{Daze}
  • 1st @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.D442XMADp01qJ7Cs]{Mindlink} @Compendium[pf2e.spells-srd.R8bqnYiThB6MYTxD]{Phantom Pain}

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.

This staff resembles a blackened and burned length of ashen wood. You can Interact to touch the tip of this staff to a torch, tinder, or a flammable substance to ignite a flame.

Activate Cast a Spell; Effect You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

  • Cantrip @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6DfLZBl8wKIV03Iq]{Ignition}
  • 1st @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.y6rAdMK6EFlV6U0t]{Breathe Fire}

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of all listed ranks of all listed spells.

Provide a written translation of texts.

*Accuracy may vary and is not guaranteed!

Provide a verbal translation of texts.

*Accuracy may vary and is not guaranteed!

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This bitter draught opens your mind to the potential of the written word. For the listed duration after drinking this elixir, you can understand any words you read, so long as they are written in a common language. This elixir doesn't automatically allow you to understand codes or extremely esoteric passages-you still need to attempt a skill check to Decipher Writing. The duration is 10 minutes.

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This bitter draught opens your mind to the potential of the written word. For the listed duration after drinking this elixir, you can understand any words you read, so long as they are written in a common language. This elixir doesn't automatically allow you to understand codes or extremely esoteric passages-you still need to attempt a skill check to Decipher Writing. The duration is 1 minute.
This polearm consists of a long, single-edged blade on the end of a 7-foot pole. It is extremely effective at delivering lethal cuts at a distance.

Morlibint of @UUID[JournalEntry.PrAuOqj2BsexgBgU.JournalEntryPage.0SO6cXvfRTtHZM6m]{Odd Stories} will pay the heroes for any especially rare or interesting tomes. He will pay five gold for each Bulk of books recovered from the Abomination Vaults. Rooms which contain such books will list how many bulk of books can be salvaged from them.

log.text: Zago (Jordan) bought Writing Set (Extra Ink and Paper) for 1SP
